summary: RSS Posts Display Bug Fix Verified - All tests passed. RSS articles now display correctly with thumbnail images, source badges, and article titles instead of gray squares.
passed_tests: ✅ API: Health endpoint returns healthy status
✅ API: Posts endpoint returns RSS posts with content_type='link'
✅ API: RSS posts have media_url (thumbnail images) - 100% coverage
✅ API: RSS posts have link_source (e.g., 'Tahiti Infos')
✅ API: RSS posts have link_title (article title)
✅ API: RSS posts have external_link (article URL)
✅ API: RSS posts have user info (media accounts)
✅ UI: Feed page loads without JavaScript errors
✅ UI: 18 source badges displayed on images
✅ UI: 18 article titles displayed under images
✅ UI: Click on RSS article opens external link correctly
critical_code_review_comments: RSS parser (rss_feeds.py) correctly extracts images with multiple fallback strategies
ArticleLinkPreview component (FeedPage.js) properly displays images with source badges and titles
Image error handling includes fallback to Polynesian-themed placeholder image
context_for_next_testing_agent: RSS posts display bug has been fixed and verified. The fix involved: 1) Enhanced RSS parser with multiple image extraction fallbacks (og:image, enclosures, media:content, feed logo, themed placeholders) 2) Improved ArticleLinkPreview component to display large thumbnail images with source badges and article titles. All RSS posts from Tahiti Infos are displaying correctly with images.

rss_posts_thumbnail_display.description: RSS posts (content_type='link') display thumbnail images instead of gray squares

source_badge_display.description: Source badge (e.g., 'Tahiti Infos') displays on the article image
source_badge_display.location: Bottom-left of image with white/90 background

article_title_display.description: Article title displays under the image

external_link_click.description: Clicking on RSS post opens external article link in new tab

regular_posts_display.description: Regular user posts (not RSS) continue to display correctly

feed_page_load.description: Feed page loads without JavaScript errors

bug_fix_verification.original_issue: Videos/articles shared via RSS feed displayed gray/blocked squares instead of thumbnails
bug_fix_verification.root_cause: RSS parser was not extracting images properly, and ArticleLinkPreview component was not handling image display
fix_applied: Enhanced extract_image_from_content() in rss_feeds.py with multiple fallback strategies
Improved ArticleLinkPreview component in FeedPage.js to display images with source badges
bug_fix_verification.verification_result: FIXED - All RSS posts now display with proper thumbnail images
